author_rating_explanation: The first author is affiliated with Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham in India and the Institute of Theoretical and Applied Informatics, Polish Academy of Sciences. India-based schools fall into the 0-5 bucket per the scoring rules. The Polish Academy of Sciences institute is not listed in the top European AI labs band. Citation count (OpenAlex cited_by_count=577) is notable but does not override the institutional band constraint.
